definitions: 赌场；娱乐场（尤指提供赌桌、博彩活动的场所）

examples.text: Your agent is about to infiltrate a life or death poker game in a hidden back room of the grand casino. You’re on the trail of an elite society of assassins, each of whom carries a signature playing card corresponding to their role.
examples.explanation: 这里的 casino 指“赌场”。句子说：你的特工即将潜入一家大赌场隐秘后室中的一场生死攸关的扑克局。该词在句中表示进行赌博活动的大型场所。

source.text: Can you solve the secret assassin society riddle? - Alex Rosenthal
